channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Twenty-six jurisdictions to hike minimum wage next month
item.description: Twenty-six state and local governments will raise their minimum wage on July 1, a wave of legislative action supporters say is long overdue.

item.title: Trump administration supports Catholic nuns in challenge to New York transgender mandate
item.description: The Justice Department plans to join a lawsuit by Catholic nuns against a New York law requiring nursing homes to...

item.title: Race does not justify violence or lack of remorse
item.description: Stabbing people and showing no remorse are wrong regardless of skin color. These should not be controversial points.

item.title: New documents suggest Fauci collaborated with intelligence agencies on Covid cover-up and misled Congress
item.description: Outgoing DNI Tulsi Gabbard said, 'After years of lies, censorship, and cover-ups, the American people deserve transparency, truth, and accountability.'
